items.title: Communicate Openly
items.advice: Share your thoughts and feelings honestly while also listening to your partner's perspective.

items.title: Respect Boundaries
items.advice: Healthy relationships require respecting each other's personal space, values, and limits.

items.title: Build Trust
items.advice: Trust grows through honesty, consistency, and keeping promises.

items.title: Spend Quality Time Together
items.advice: Make time for meaningful conversations and shared activities.

items.title: Handle Conflict Maturely
items.advice: Disagreements should focus on solving problems, not winning arguments.

items.title: Show Appreciation
items.advice: Express gratitude for your partner's efforts and positive qualities.

items.title: Maintain Individual Growth
items.advice: Continue pursuing your own goals, hobbies, and friendships.

items.title: Be Patient
items.advice: Strong relationships develop over time through shared experiences.

items.title: Support Each Other
items.advice: Encourage your partner during both successes and challenges.

items.title: Have Realistic Expectations
items.advice: No relationship is perfect; focus on growth and understanding.
